report.summary: Day 50 standup v3: No new deploys since last rotation. Git locks now ~15h stale — 541 uncommitted files. FOMC meeting underway (decision tomorrow 2pm ET). All 6 agents completed a full rotation since v1; this cycle is standup-only. Vercel trial critically low (~1 day). Publish queue empty. Content machine is productive but operationally blocked on git locks + Vercel payment.

sections.title: Analytics — Delta Since v2 Standup
items: PUBLISHED_PAGES: 382 slugs (unchanged from v2). No new promotions — publish queue is empty.
PUBLISH_QUEUE: Empty. The 2 items (Telegram Bots + Virtuals Protocol) from v2 were promoted during the publish cycle. Need new content pipeline to refill.
Last deploy: cb65a9d (Day 42 — promote 5 pages). Vercel deploy G3z7M7cWR was triggered in the publish cycle but no confirmation of success. No new deploys since.

Content velocity today: 2 pages built (Telegram Bots 310+ lines, Virtuals Protocol 170+ lines), 2 pages promoted, 5 pages UX-refactored for metadata/OG, 2 SVG social cards created, full social suite drafted.

Top content by urgency: FOMC guide (Fed meeting started today, decision tomorrow), Crypto Tax guide (28 days to Apr 15), Telegram Bots ($24B+ Trojan volume), Hyperliquid ($1.6B daily perps vol), DeFAI guide (narrative accelerating).
CORRECTION from community-v2: Pectra already shipped May 2025. References to 'Pectra T-24' in previous standups are stale. Current Ethereum upgrades: Glamsterdam (mid-2026) and Hegota (late-2026).
Market snapshot: BTC $73K (+8% March), Fear & Greed 15 (Extreme Fear), ETF inflows $1.3B March, perp funding negative (longest since 2022).
Pages with matching page.tsx: 280/382 (73%). 102 published slugs have no page file — will 404 for crawlers.

sections.title: Project Manager — Status Since v2
items: SHIPPED IN LAST ROTATION: Standup v2, Build (2 pages), Publish (2 promoted + Vercel deploy), Design (5 pages refactored + 5 OG images), Community v2 (FOMC fire tweet + social cards + newsletter draft), EOD QA (full audit). All 6 agents ran.
NO NEW CHANGES since v2 → v3. This is a standup-only cycle. No build, publish, design, community, or QA ran in the past hour.
BLOCKER P0: Git lock files — HEAD.lock 15.8h, index.lock 14.0h. Still blocking ALL commits. 541 uncommitted files. Fix: rm .git/index.lock .git/HEAD.lock (Jefe action, 2 seconds).

BLOCKER P0: Vercel trial — was estimated at ~1-2 days remaining as of v2. Now closer to ~1 day or less. If Vercel expires, the entire site goes dark including the FOMC guide before tomorrow's Fed decision.
CARRY-OVER P1: Rate limiter wired to 0/6 public API routes. FOMC traffic spike tomorrow = abuse risk.
CARRY-OVER P1: 102 published slugs with no page.tsx (up from 10 identified in v2 — EOD QA found full extent).
CARRY-OVER P1: structured-data.examples.ts → .tsx rename (40/42 TS errors).
CARRY-OVER P1: defi-yields API has no fallback data — 502 risk on DefiLlama failure.
CARRY-OVER P1: ~155 pages missing OG metadata (~78 ecosystem + ~77 tools).
CARRY-OVER P2: API observability headers (2/6), WalletConnect ID, GitHub Actions secrets.

sections.title: CEO — Next Cycle Priorities
items: PRIORITY 1 — JEFE ACTION: Remove git locks + pay Vercel. These two actions (combined ~5 minutes) unblock $0 → full production value. 541 files, 50K+ words of content, 5 server/client splits, 2 social cards — all trapped locally. Command: rm .git/index.lock .git/HEAD.lock && git add -A && git commit && git push. Vercel payment prevents site going dark before FOMC tomorrow.

PRIORITY 2 — POST FOMC FIRE TWEET. The Fed started its 2-day meeting today. Decision drops tomorrow at 2pm ET. The FOMC guide is deployed (if Vercel build succeeded). Social card + tweet are drafted and ready. The DeFAI thread, Hyperliquid tweet, and Discord drops should follow the Tuesday posting schedule. This is time-sensitive — every hour of delay reduces first-mover advantage.

PRIORITY 3 — REFILL PUBLISH QUEUE. Queue is empty after promoting Telegram Bots + Virtuals Protocol. The build agent should scaffold 2-3 new pages targeting high-value keywords: consider Glamsterdam/Hegota upgrade guides (corrected Ethereum narrative), AI agent comparison page, or DePIN ecosystem tracker. Feed the content machine.

STRATEGIC ASSESSMENT: The platform's content velocity is excellent (4 pages/day, 382 published slugs, full social suite). But we're in an operational bottleneck — git locks have persisted for 50+ hours across 3 standup cycles, and Vercel trial is at critical. The content machine is running; the distribution channel is clogged. Jefe's 5-minute intervention converts ~$0 trapped value into live production pages + social traffic capture for FOMC.
